News & events

From the field.

Outreach drives, scholarship awards, leadership workshops and the everyday moments that move our mission forward.

Outreach•May 2026

Back-to-School drive reaches four new communities

Hundreds of children received enrolment support and learning kits ahead of the new term — and four new partner schools joined the RECI network. Read how the campaign came together, and meet some of the students returning to class.
